triggers.description: Whenever NICKNAME enters or attacks, create a tapped Vibranium token. (It's an artifact with indestructible and "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.")
Whenever NICKNAME enters or attacks, create a tapped Vibranium token. (It's an artifact with indestructible and "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.")
Whenever you cast an artifact spell with mana value 4 or greater, put two +1/+1 counters on NICKNAME.
